title: Luffy Returns to the Final Fight
description: Luffy returns to the final battle against Enel, refusing to let the self-proclaimed god erase Skypiea or the old promise.
scene: Across pages 2, 3, 4, 5, this scene focuses on Calgara, Conis, Luffy, Enel, Nami. Luffy returns to the final battle against Enel, refusing to let the self-proclaimed god erase Skypiea or the old promise.

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: However, the bell was not rung.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: The more the people called him "liar,"

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Until the very moment of his death...

summary: Luffy returns to the final battle against Enel, refusing to let the self-proclaimed god erase Skypiea or the old promise.
